cited_facts.why_it_matters: Describes the technical functionality of the SingleAssetVault amendment (XLS-65) but does not specify the default vote configuration in the source code or release notes.

However, none of the facts explicitly state the default vote (YES or NO) configured in the latest stable release source code. Without explicit evidence of the default vote setting, the value cannot be inferred.
